boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on exemption-status class
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-JAD-090-P requires exemption-status class before sale

final_answer: Source boundary remains open. CERT-JAD-090 covers buyer, state, category, date and TX-44 but omits required exemption-status class per STD-JAD-090-P. WARN-JAD-090 mandates verification. Action may not proceed until class is explicitly confirmed in source records.
